metadata.description: Agent Skills for Obsidian — plugin syntax (queries, tasks, charts, interactive UI), graph view tuning, vault auditing, heatmap visualizations

plugins.name: obsidian-dataview
plugins.description: Skill for the Obsidian Dataview plugin — DQL queries, DataviewJS API, metadata model, every function

plugins.name: obsidian-charts
plugins.description: Skill for the Obsidian Charts plugin (phibr0) — chart codeblocks, advanced JSON, table-driven charts, DataviewJS rendering via window.renderChart

plugins.name: obsidian-meta-bind
plugins.description: Skill for the Obsidian Meta Bind plugin — buttons, input fields, view fields, embeds, JS Engine integration, and the validation pitfalls

plugins.name: obsidian-tasks-syntax
plugins.description: Skill for the Obsidian Tasks plugin — task lines with emoji metadata (📅⏳🛫🔁), priorities, recurrence, dependencies

plugins.name: obsidian-tasks-query
plugins.description: Skill for the Obsidian Tasks plugin — query blocks with filters, sorting, grouping, layout

plugins.name: obsidian-tasks-cli
plugins.description: Skill for the Obsidian Tasks plugin — read and update tasks via Obsidian CLI and Tasks plugin API

plugins.name: obsidian-graph
plugins.description: Skill for tuning the Obsidian Graph view — color groups, filters, forces, full graph.json schema, search syntax, RGB encoding

plugins.name: obsidian-graph-audit
plugins.description: Skill for auditing the vault through the Graph view — orphans, hubs, name collisions, hidden cluster patterns, link-density signals

plugins.name: obsidian-heatmap
plugins.description: Skill for heatmap visualizations in Obsidian — Heatmap Calendar plugin (Richardsl) plus custom DataviewJS patterns for week/matrix/sticky-row layouts
